releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Release 1.1.2

- Resolved ObsidianReviewBot lint warnings across core files (render pipeline, helpers, and settings handling).
- Tightened type checks and error messages to satisfy ESLint rules.
- Clarified promise handling in template rendering to avoid unhandled rejections.
- Switched debug logging to allowed console methods.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Fix manifest.json description to match the submitted Obsidian plugin description after a rejection for mismatch.
- Version bump only; no functional changes.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Release 1.1.0 (from 1.0.3)

Highlights
- Reworked render lifecycle with `MarkdownRenderChild` to align with Obsidian’s component lifecycle and reduce stale render artifacts.
- Added template dependency tracking and safer propagation logic (including a max propagation setting).
- Applied Obsidian guideline updates (sentence case UI, `getLanguage()`, conditional commands, normalizePath).
- Improved settings UX with folder path suggestions.
- Added debug logging and build script improvements.

Changes

Rendering lifecycle & stability
- Introduced `HbRenderChild` to manage code block render lifecycle via `ctx.addChild()`.
- Isolated render contexts per render to avoid stale render children.
- Added lifecycle debug logs to track render child load/unload.

Template dependency & propagation
- Tracked nested template dependencies via parent markers.
- Cleaned dependency graph when watchers are removed or templates disappear.
- Added max propagation count setting to prevent infinite loops.
- Avoided dependent rerender loops on rebuild.
- Only propagate when template content actually changes.

Template missing / source mode
- Handled missing template creation by listening for create events and triggering rerender.
- Improved rerender in source mode.

Commands & UI compliance
- Removed plugin prefix from command IDs.
- Made rebuild commands conditional (active Markdown view required).
- Updated UI strings to sentence case.
- Switched language detection to `getLanguage()`.

Settings UX
- Normalized user-defined paths via `normalizePath()`.
- Added `AbstractInputSuggest` for template/constant folder inputs.

Debug & build
- Added debug logging and tied it to build flags.
- Added `cross-env` and updated scripts for Windows-friendly env vars.
- Dependency/tooling updates.
- Added `pnpm-workspace.yaml` and `AGENTS.md`.

Notes
- Command IDs changed: if you had hotkeys bound, you may need to rebind them.

Commits (1.0.3 → 1.1.0)
- 611b4ea update package
- 4c05d94 delete css
- 547dc3f Use getLanguage from Obsidian
- ffdbfd8 Use sentence case in UI strings
- 7534044 Remove command id prefixes
- 1167255 Make rebuild commands conditional
- 6edfaa7 Normalize settings paths
- a4f2ba2 Add folder path suggestions
- ef97deb Refactor render lifecycle with MarkdownRenderChild
- 068b667 Track nested template dependencies
- ac0effa Clean template dependency graph
- ff15dfb Handle missing template creation
- 2385593 Support rerender in source mode
- 80fa8ff Add debug logging functionality and improve language handling
- 6e47118 feat: add configurable propagation limit for template updates
- 58bc1d5 chore: bump version to 1.1.0 in manifest and package files
- 79f2862 test AGENTS.md
- 7d631a4 chore: add cross-env dependency to package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml
- 23189c6 chore: update scripts in package.json to use cross-env for environment variables
- 3c0f84e feat: add debug logging for render child lifecycle events
- 97a8015 fix: isolate render context to avoid stale render children
- 8fb8079 fix: avoid dependent rerender loop on rebuild
- 29f790f fix: update watcher item handling and improve propagation logic
